description: Anti-drift coding squad with hierarchical coordination and raft consensus

panes.name: Coordinator
panes.focus: Maintain authoritative state, resolve conflicts, enforce scope. CHECK: Is each worker still aligned with their original mission?

panes.name: Researcher
panes.focus: Gather requirements, analyze existing code, study patterns. Signal findings via .claude/vp-signals/

panes.name: Architect
panes.focus: Design system components, typed interfaces, ADRs. Depends on Researcher findings.

panes.name: Coder-1
panes.focus: Implement features following Architect's design. Short TDD cycles.

panes.name: Coder-2
panes.focus: Parallel implementation of independent module. Coordinate with Coder-1 on shared interfaces.

panes.name: Tester
panes.focus: Write unit + integration tests. Track coverage. Signal blockers.

panes.name: Reviewer
panes.focus: Code review for quality, security, architecture alignment. Gate merge decisions.

panes.name: QA
panes.focus: End-to-end user testing with screenshots. Launch app, click every button. ZERO tolerance.
